_note: Warframe resource database for Discord bot. 151 entries covering all resources in foundry_recipes.json resource_rarities. Categories: raw, craftable, component, special, gem, event. Factions: Grineer, Corpus, Infested, Orokin, Entrati, Void/Zariman, Universal, Techrot, Duviri. Sources verified against warframe.fandom.com wiki.

Aggristone.name: Aggristone
Aggristone.description: A rough stone aggregate found in Cambion Drift excavation sites. Aggristone forms where Infested biofilm has mineralised Deimos's subsurface rock layers.
Aggristone.tb_use: Common Deimos crafting material. Required for several Mother Token trades and Necralisk-tier weapon components.

Alloy Plate.name: Alloy Plate
Alloy Plate.description: Dense sheets of compressed alloy harvested from manufacturing facilities on Venus, Jupiter, and Sedna. One of the most common structural materials in the Origin System.
Alloy Plate.source: Venus, Jupiter, Sedna, Ceres, Phobos, Pluto
Alloy Plate.drop_locations: Venus, Jupiter, Sedna, Ceres, Phobos, Pluto
Alloy Plate.tb_use: Common crafting material used in a vast range of Warframe and weapon blueprints. Always farm more.

Circuits.name: Circuits
Circuits.description: Integrated circuit boards salvaged from Corpus electronics and Grineer communication arrays. Essential for systems-tier Warframe crafting.
Circuits.tb_use: Required for Saryn, Banshee, Valkyr, Nyx, and several weapons. Farm Venus for quick stacks.

Connla Sprout.name: Connla Sprout
Connla Sprout.description: A fungal sprout harvested from the bioluminescent undergrowth of the Cambion Drift. Connla Sprouts grow in clusters near Fass-active geological vents.
Connla Sprout.tb_use: Deimos plant resource. Required for Entrati standing token trade-ins and Necraloid Syndicate components.

Eevani.name: Eevani
Eevani.description: A tiny bioluminescent arthropod native to Deimos. Eevani congregate near heat vents in the Cambion Drift and are collected by conservation scouts.
Eevani.tb_use: Deimos wildlife resource. Used in Daughter's token trades at the Necralisk for standing and component blueprints.

Entrati Obols.name: Entrati Obols
Entrati Obols.description: Circular tokens of Entrati origin, recovered from Cambion Drift caches and Infested containers. Used as the primary currency within Deimos trading circles.
Entrati Obols.tb_use: Common Deimos currency-resource. Trade with Entrati family members to obtain blueprints, standing, and rare components.

Ferrite.name: Ferrite
Ferrite.description: Dense, compressed iron-based ore found throughout Earth and Mercury. Ferrite is the backbone of Grineer industrial manufacturing and one of the most common resources in the Origin System.
Ferrite.tb_use: Core crafting material in vast quantities. Used in almost every Warframe and weapon blueprint. Always stockpile.

Fish Meat.name: Fish Meat
Fish Meat.description: Protein-dense meat recovered by processing caught fish. The quality and quantity depend on the fish species and whether it was captured unharmed by a tranq shot.
Fish Meat.drop_locations: Plains of Eidolon, Orb Vallis, Cambion Drift
Fish Meat.tb_use: Crafting material from fishing. Required for certain Cetus, Fortuna, and Necralisk fishing standing trades and cook-item blueprints.

Fish Oil.name: Fish Oil
Fish Oil.description: Rich oil extracted from fish organs during processing at Hai-Luk or Fisher Hai-Luk's shack. Heavier fish yield proportionally more oil.
Fish Oil.tb_use: Required for several Cetus standing trade-ins, Zaw crafting, and Amp component blueprints. Farm by fishing Murkrays and Cuthol in Cetus.

Grokdrul.name: Grokdrul
Grokdrul.description: A viscous, amber-coloured fluid found in Grineer storage containers on the Plains of Eidolon. Grokdrul is a stabilising agent used in Grineer manufacturing processes.
Grokdrul.source: Grineer containers, Plains of Eidolon enemies
Grokdrul.tb_use: Common Plains crafting resource. Required for several Cetus standing tier-up trades and early Zaw handles. Collect from every Grineer container.

Kovnik.name: Kovnik
Kovnik.description: A jagged blue-grey mineral gem extracted from geological deposits on the Plains of Eidolon using a Nosam Cutter mining tool. Forms in fractures of Unum's stone.
Kovnik.tb_use: Common mining gem from the Plains. Used in Cetus standing trades and Amp component blueprints from the Quills. Take a mining tool to the Plains.

Nacreous Pebble.name: Nacreous Pebble
Nacreous Pebble.description: A smooth, iridescent pebble with a pearl-like surface, extracted from Orb Vallis geological veins. Its layered mineral structure diffracts light in shimmering patterns.
Nacreous Pebble.tb_use: Common Fortuna mining resource. Used in Solaris United standing tier-up trades and Kitgun component recipes at Rude Zuud.

Nano Spores.name: Nano Spores
Nano Spores.description: Microscopic Infested spores shed by Infested organisms on Saturn, Neptune, and Eris. Despite their biological origin, they are widely used as a binding agent in Tenno manufacturing.
Nano Spores.tb_use: Required for Paris, Furax, Ignis, Kronen, Hydroid, and many others. Farm Saturn Defence/Survival.

Polymer Bundle.name: Polymer Bundle
Polymer Bundle.description: Flexible synthetic polymer filaments produced in Corpus manufacturing plants on Venus and Uranus. Used in insulation, circuitry housings, and structural reinforcement.
Polymer Bundle.tb_use: Core crafting material. Used in nearly every Warframe and weapon blueprint. Farm Venus or Uranus Survival.

Rubedo.name: Rubedo
Rubedo.description: Blood-red crystalline mineral found on Phobos, Earth, Sedna, Europa, and the Void. Rubedo's electromagnetic properties make it invaluable in advanced component construction.
Rubedo.tb_use: Intermediate crafting material. Required for advanced weapon and Warframe blueprints. Stockpile from Phobos or Sedna.

Salvage.name: Salvage
Salvage.description: Scavenged scrap metal and mechanical components from Grineer and Corpus battlefield wreckage. Abundant on Mars and Jupiter.
Salvage.tb_use: Required in large quantities for many weapon blueprints, especially Rhino and Nyx. Farm Mars Survival.

Scrap.name: Scrap
Scrap.description: Salvaged mechanical debris recovered from the Zariman Ten Zero's derelict corridors. Scrap accumulates as Void-corrupted machinery decays over centuries of drift.
Scrap.tb_use: Common resource from Zariman missions. Used in Synicate Medallion trades and Drifter-tier crafting components.

Techrot Chitin.name: Techrot Chitin
Techrot Chitin.description: The hardened carapace material shed by Techrot-strain robotic organisms. Techrot enemies in Höllvania drop chitin fragments as they take damage.
Techrot Chitin.tb_use: Common Höllvania resource. Required for Syndicate trades and early Duviri-era weapon components at the Synthesis Terminal.

Yao Shrub.name: Yao Shrub
Yao Shrub.description: A thorny, mineral-encrusted shrub native to Deimos. Yao Shrubs grow wherever bio-mineral deposits surface through Infested biomass on the Cambion Drift.
Yao Shrub.tb_use: Common Deimos plant material. Used in Mother Token crafting and Entrati family standing tier-up trades.

Argon Crystal.name: Argon Crystal
Argon Crystal.description: A crystalline energy matrix that forms only within Orokin Void fissures. Argon Crystals decay at 50% per day outside the Void — use them the moment you acquire them.
Argon Crystal.source: Orokin Void fissure missions, storage containers
Argon Crystal.tb_use: Legendary crafting material. Required for Hydroid Neuroptics/Chassis, Kronen, Atterax, and many Archwing components. DECAYS — only farm immediately before crafting.

Forma.name: Forma
Forma.description: An Orokin catalyst that restructures a weapon or Warframe's polarity configuration, unlocking additional mod drain capacity. Forma blueprints fall from Void missions and Nightwave.
Forma.source: Void missions, Nightwave rewards, Sortie rewards, Void Fissure Relics
Forma.tb_use: Legendary craftable component. Required for many advanced weapon recipes in the Foundry. Very rare — plan crafting accordingly.

Mandachord.name: Mandachord
Mandachord.description: An ancient Orokin melodic instrument — the core component within Octavia's ability system. The Mandachord blueprint is obtained from Lua music puzzles.
Mandachord.source: Lua music puzzle (Octavia Quest), Lua missions
Mandachord.tb_use: Legendary component for crafting Octavia's Blueprint. Acquired by solving the Orokin melody puzzle on Lua. Cannot be obtained any other way.

Nitain Extract.name: Nitain Extract
Nitain Extract.description: A volatile refined compound extracted from Grineer chemical silos. Originally behind Alert missions, now primarily obtained through Nightwave Cred.
Nitain Extract.source: Nightwave Cred Offerings, Reactor Sabotage, Ghoul Purge bounties
Nitain Extract.tb_use: Legendary crafting material. Required for Ivara Chassis (×4), Ivara Systems (×5), Vauban, and Wukong components. Extremely limited — never sell.

Orokin Cell.name: Orokin Cell
Orokin Cell.description: Ancient Orokin power cells containing a near-inexhaustible energy source. Recovered from Orokin Derelicts, Orokin Towers, and powerful bosses across the Origin System.
Orokin Cell.source: Saturn (Tethys), Ceres (Seimeni), Orokin Derelicts, Boss drops
Orokin Cell.tb_use: Legendary crafting material. Required for EVERY Warframe main blueprint assembly and many weapons. Never sell. Farm Saturn/Ceres Defence.

Anomaly Shard.name: Anomaly Shard
Anomaly Shard.description: A crystalline fragment shed by Sentient forces clustered around the Murex invasion anomalies in the Veil Proxima. Anomaly Shards pulse with alien resonance.
Anomaly Shard.tb_use: Rare Railjack resource from Sentient Anomaly encounters. Required for Shedu weapon components and Necramech upgrades.

Bellow Voca.name: Bellow Voca
Bellow Voca.description: A resonant Void-infused crystal harvested from the Zariman Ten Zero. Bellow Voca vibrate at frequencies beyond human hearing, storing Void energy in their lattice.
Bellow Voca.tb_use: Rare Zariman resource. Required for Incarnon Genesis upgrades and Drifter-tier crafting at the Chrysalith. Farm Zariman Circuit/Void Flood missions.

Bo.name: Bo
Bo.description: A staff weapon blueprint recovered from high-level Grineer caches. The Bo is a traditional Tenno long-arm built for channelling melee energy.
Bo.source: Grineer high-level mission drops, enemy drops
Bo.tb_use: Weapon blueprint component. Used to craft the Bo polearm in the Foundry. Farm from Grineer missions or obtain from the market.

Breath Of The Eidolon.name: Breath Of The Eidolon
Breath Of The Eidolon.description: A fragment of Eidolon resonance, gathered from the luminous mist released when an Eidolon is struck during its synovial resonance cycle. Rare and difficult to collect.
Breath Of The Eidolon.source: Plains of Eidolon — Eidolon Teralyst/Gantulyst/Hydrolyst encounters
Breath Of The Eidolon.tb_use: Rare Plains resource. Required for Focus Lens crafting and Quills Amp components. Farm Eidolon hunts at night on the Plains.

Bronco.name: Bronco
Bronco.description: A compact pistol blueprint capable of firing a scatter-shot burst. The Bronco blueprint is recovered from specific Corpus assassination targets.
Bronco.tb_use: Weapon blueprint component. Required to craft the Bronco pistol in the Foundry.

Calda Toroid.name: Calda Toroid
Calda Toroid.description: A spherical Corpus energy storage unit recovered from the Spaceport on Orb Vallis. Calda Toroids power experimental Corpus propulsion systems.
Calda Toroid.source: Spaceport enemies and caches (Orb Vallis), Profit-Taker Orb
Calda Toroid.tb_use: Rare Fortuna resource. Required for Moa and K-Drive components from Fortuna vendors. Farm the Spaceport point of interest on Orb Vallis.

Cetus Wisp.name: Cetus Wisp
Cetus Wisp.description: A glowing bio-luminescent orb that drifts along the shoreline of the Plains of Eidolon at night. Cetus Wisps vanish at dawn — hunt them only after sunset.
Cetus Wisp.tb_use: Rare Plains resource. Required for Zaw handles, Amp Prism blueprints, and Focus Lens crafting. Only collectable at night — fly close to the water's edge.

Control Module.name: Control Module
Control Module.description: Advanced Orokin-era control hardware recovered from Void caches and high-level Corpus units on Neptune. Manages complex feedback systems inside Warframe suits.
Control Module.tb_use: Rare crafting material. Required for Warframe Systems blueprints across most frames. Farm Neptune Exterminate or Void missions.

Dendrite Blastoma.name: Dendrite Blastoma
Dendrite Blastoma.description: A calcified neural nodule recovered from Deimos Infested organisms. Dendrite Blastomas form where the Infested hive mind calcifies its communication threads.
Dendrite Blastoma.tb_use: Rare Deimos resource. Used in Necraloid Syndicate Specter weapon blueprints and Predasite companion components.

Drakgoon.name: Drakgoon
Drakgoon.description: A Grineer flak-cannon blueprint recovered from high-value Grineer targets. The Drakgoon fires a volley of bouncing flechettes with unique ricochet physics.
Drakgoon.tb_use: Weapon blueprint component. Craft the Drakgoon shotgun in the Foundry after obtaining the blueprint.

Echo Voca.name: Echo Voca
Echo Voca.description: A resonant crystal recovered from the Zariman Ten Zero's echo chambers. Echo Voca stores residual Void-speech imprints from the Zariman's long drift.
Echo Voca.tb_use: Rare Zariman resource. Used alongside Bellow Voca for Incarnon Genesis weapon upgrades. Farm Zariman Void Armageddon missions.

Ember Neuroptics.name: Ember Neuroptics
Ember Neuroptics.description: The neural interface component for the Ember Warframe. Stripped from Sargas Ruk's armour reserves — the General keeps Ember components under heavy guard on Saturn.
Ember Neuroptics.tb_use: Warframe component blueprint. Required to assemble Ember with her Systems and Chassis blueprints. Grind Sargas Ruk assassination.

Entrati Lanthorn.name: Entrati Lanthorn
Entrati Lanthorn.description: A small Orokin lantern device recovered from deep Cambion Drift excavations. Entrati Lanthorns were used by the Entrati family to navigate the dark biomass tunnels of Deimos.
Entrati Lanthorn.tb_use: Rare Deimos resource. Required for high-tier Entrati standing trades and Helminth subsume unlocks. Very limited — farm Deimos Survival at high level.

Experimental Arc-Relay.name: Experimental Arc-Relay
Experimental Arc-Relay.description: A prototype arc-relay assembly salvaged from the Zariman's experimental propulsion labs. These unstable relays are the building blocks of Void-arc weapons.
Experimental Arc-Relay.source: Zariman Ten Zero mission reward caches
Experimental Arc-Relay.tb_use: Rare Zariman component. Required for Phenmor and Laetum Incarnon Genesis upgrades.

Faceted Tiametrite.name: Faceted Tiametrite
Faceted Tiametrite.description: A finely faceted gem extracted from rich Fortuna veins with a maxed Sunpoint Plasma Drill. Faceted Tiametrite catches light in deep violet prismatic patterns.
Faceted Tiametrite.tb_use: Rare Fortuna mining gem. Required for gilded Kitgun components and high-tier Solaris United standing trades at Rude Zuud.

Frost Chassis.name: Frost Chassis
Frost Chassis.description: The body chassis component for the Frost Warframe. Recovered from the Raptors — the twin Corpus proxies that guard Frost's parts on Europa.
Frost Chassis.tb_use: Warframe component blueprint. Needed alongside Frost Neuroptics and Systems to assemble Frost. Run Raptor assassination on Europa.

Furis.name: Furis
Furis.description: A full-auto Corpus pistol blueprint recovered from high-level Corpus caches. The Furis fires a rapid stream of Electricity-charged rounds.
Furis.tb_use: Weapon blueprint component. Craft the Furis full-auto pistol in the Foundry.

Gallium.name: Gallium
Gallium.description: A rare metallic element with an extremely low melting point. Gallium pools in the cavities of Grineer-occupied terrain on Mars and Uranus.
Gallium.tb_use: Rare crafting material. Required for Rhino (main blueprint), Oberon, Hydroid Systems, Fragor, Galatine, Akstiletto. Farm Mars Survival or Uranus.

Gyromag Systems.name: Gyromag Systems
Gyromag Systems.description: Precision gyroscopic stabilisation units recovered from Corpus Coolant Raknoids on Orb Vallis. Used as core components in Corpus K-Drive hovercrafts.
Gyromag Systems.source: Temple of Profit enemies, Coolant Raknoids (Orb Vallis)
Gyromag Systems.tb_use: Rare Fortuna resource. Required for MOA Moa precepts and K-Drive components at Zuud. Farm Orb Vallis bounties near the Temple of Profit.

Intact Sentient Core.name: Intact Sentient Core
Intact Sentient Core.description: An undamaged core fragment recovered from a Sentient unit before its self-neutralisation sequence completes. Intact cores preserve the Sentient's adaptive memory matrix.
Intact Sentient Core.source: Sentient enemies (Lua, Veil Proxima, Plains of Eidolon)
Intact Sentient Core.drop_locations: Lua, Veil Proxima, Plains of Eidolon
Intact Sentient Core.tb_use: Rare Sentient resource. Required for Eidolon and Sentient-themed weapon components. Trade 5 Intact cores at Quills for one Exceptional Sentient Core.

Javlok Capacitor.name: Javlok Capacitor
Javlok Capacitor.description: A high-output capacitor recovered from the Grineer Javlok flamethrower cannon. Sourced from Kela de Thaym's arena soldiers on Sedna.
Javlok Capacitor.tb_use: Rare weapon component. Required for Javlok weapon crafting. Farm Kela de Thaym's assassination mission for reliable drops.

Kavat Genetic Code.name: Kavat Genetic Code
Kavat Genetic Code.description: A genetic data sequence extracted from feral Kavat organisms on Earth. Each sample contains a unique bio-imprint used to breed a domesticated Kavat companion.
Kavat Genetic Code.tb_use: Rare companion resource. Required to breed a Kavat from egg. Scan 10 feral Kavats with the Codex Scanner to obtain one code — takes patience.

Kunai.name: Kunai
Kunai.description: A lightweight throwing knife blueprint recovered from high-level mission caches. Kunai can be charged for heavy Impact or thrown rapidly in volleys.
Kunai.tb_use: Weapon blueprint component. Craft the Kunai throwing knives in the Foundry.

Lazulite Toroid.name: Lazulite Toroid
Lazulite Toroid.description: An energy storage toroid recovered from the Enrichment Labs research facility on Orb Vallis. Lazulite Toroids power Corpus energy research equipment.
Lazulite Toroid.source: Enrichment Labs enemies and caches (Orb Vallis)
Lazulite Toroid.tb_use: Rare Fortuna resource. Required for high-tier Moa and K-Drive components. Farm Enrichment Labs with a squad.

Magnus.name: Magnus
Magnus.description: A powerful Corpus revolver blueprint recovered from Corpus security vaults. The Magnus fires high-impact rounds with considerable stopping power.
Magnus.tb_use: Weapon blueprint component. Craft the Magnus revolver in the Foundry.

Morphics.name: Morphics
Morphics.description: Malleable Orokin-era material that shifts between solid and semi-liquid states under electromagnetic stress. Found on Mercury, Mars, Europa, and Pluto.
Morphics.tb_use: Rare crafting material. Required for nearly every Warframe Chassis blueprint and many weapon recipes. Farm Mercury or Mars missions.

Nautilus Carapace.name: Nautilus Carapace
Nautilus Carapace.description: The outer hull plating for a Nautilus Sentinel. Recovered from Railjack missions as a Corpus high-value drop.
Nautilus Carapace.tb_use: Sentinel component blueprint. Required to craft Nautilus with its Cerebrum and Systems blueprints. Farm Corpus Railjack Exterminate.

Nautilus Cerebrum.name: Nautilus Cerebrum
Nautilus Cerebrum.description: The neural core of the Nautilus Sentinel — a compact Corpus AI module recovered from Railjack mission caches.
Nautilus Cerebrum.tb_use: Sentinel component blueprint. Required alongside Carapace and Systems. Farm Corpus Railjack missions.

Nautilus Systems.name: Nautilus Systems
Nautilus Systems.description: The propulsion and systems assembly for a Nautilus Sentinel, sourced from Railjack Corpus mission drops.
Nautilus Systems.tb_use: Sentinel component blueprint. Final piece to craft Nautilus. Farm Corpus Railjack Exterminate or Skirmish.

Neural Sensors.name: Neural Sensors
Neural Sensors.description: Exotic neural interface components recovered from Corpus Sapping Ospreys and high-value targets on Jupiter. Dense micro-processors bridging organic and synthetic intelligence.
Neural Sensors.tb_use: Rare crafting material. Required for Warframe Neuroptics across most frames and in Tipedo. Do not sell — always in demand. Farm Jupiter Defence.

Neurodes.name: Neurodes
Neurodes.description: Rare biological nodes recovered from Infested-contaminated organisms. Dense neural tissue that interfaces with Orokin-era technology — indispensable for high-tier crafting.
Neurodes.tb_use: Rare crafting material. Essential for Warframe Neuroptics and high-level weapon components. Never sell. Farm Earth Survival or Eris.

Nullstones.name: Nullstones
Nullstones.description: Dense Void-crystallised stones from the Zariman's most heavily Void-saturated corridors. Nullstones suppress nearby electronic signals — even from Orokin systems.
Nullstones.tb_use: Rare Zariman resource. Required for several Incarnon Genesis adaptation paths. Farm Void Armageddon at Zariman for reliable drops.

Ocular Stem-Root.name: Ocular Stem-Root
Ocular Stem-Root.description: A calcified sensory root extracted from Deimos Infested fauna. These structures were once visual sensory organs before the Infestation repurposed them as hive-network nodes.
Ocular Stem-Root.tb_use: Rare Deimos resource. Required for Necraloid Specter blueprint crafting. Farm Cambion Drift high-level Survival.

Parasitic Tethermaw.name: Parasitic Tethermaw
Parasitic Tethermaw.description: A rare fish specimen native to the phosphorescent pools of the Cambion Drift. The Tethermaw attaches to larger Infested organisms and feeds on their bio-energy.
Parasitic Tethermaw.tb_use: Rare Deimos fish resource. Required for Daughter's fishing standing trades and Necraloid Syndicate components. Use Processed Fass Residue bait.

Pathos Clamp.name: Pathos Clamp
Pathos Clamp.description: A mechanical clamp of Duviri origin, salvaged from the Undercroft's collapsed Orokin machinery. Pathos Clamps bind Duviri's cycling reality together at the structural level.
Pathos Clamp.tb_use: Rare Duviri resource. Required for Incarnon Genesis weapon upgrades and Duviri-specific crafting. Farm Duviri Circuit runs.

Purified Heciphron.name: Purified Heciphron
Purified Heciphron.description: A chemically purified variant of raw Heciphron ore, processed through the Entrati bio-refinery at the Necralisk. The purification process amplifies its energy storage density.
Purified Heciphron.source: Crafted from raw Heciphron (Cambion Drift mining) + Entrati processing
Purified Heciphron.tb_use: Rare Deimos gem component. Required for Necramech and Entrati weapon blueprints. Mine raw Heciphron on Cambion Drift, then purify it.

Pustulent Cognitive Nodule.name: Pustulent Cognitive Nodule
Pustulent Cognitive Nodule.description: A bulging bio-nodule from Deimos Infested organisms that served as a distributed processing node in the Infested hive network.
Pustulent Cognitive Nodule.source: Rare Deimos Infested enemy drops (Cambion Drift)
Pustulent Cognitive Nodule.tb_use: Rare Deimos resource. Required for Necraloid Specter upgrades and Mother Token high-tier trades.

Saryn Systems.name: Saryn Systems
Saryn Systems.description: The internal systems assembly for the Saryn Warframe. Recovered from Kela de Thaym's arena on Sedna — Saryn parts are guarded by the Executioner herself.
Saryn Systems.tb_use: Warframe component blueprint. Needed alongside Saryn Neuroptics and Chassis to complete Saryn. Grind Kela de Thaym.

Scintillant.name: Scintillant
Scintillant.description: A rare bio-luminescent mineral that collects at the base of Cambion Drift bioluminescent columns. Scintillant glows faintly even after extraction.
Scintillant.source: Cambion Drift rare nodes, Vault bounty rewards (Deimos)
Scintillant.tb_use: Rare Deimos resource. Required for Necramech component blueprints. Found in specific Cambion Drift locations — or as a rare Isolation Vault bounty reward.

Scrubber Exa Brain.name: Scrubber Exa Brain
Scrubber Exa Brain.description: The processing core extracted from a Scrubber Exa — an advanced Techrot-strain robotic enemy in Höllvania. Rare drop from their neural cavity on defeat.
Scrubber Exa Brain.tb_use: Rare Höllvania resource. Required for Syndicate Token trades and Drifter-era weapon components. Target Scrubber Exa elite units.

Seriglass Shard.name: Seriglass Shard
Seriglass Shard.description: A fragment of Deimos seriglass — a material formed when Infested biofluid crystallises under extreme pressure in deep Deimos caves. Highly resonant with Orokin frequencies.
Seriglass Shard.tb_use: Rare Deimos gem. Required for Necraloid Syndicate Amp component blueprints. Farm deep Cambion Drift cave mining nodes.

Sola Toroid.name: Sola Toroid
Sola Toroid.description: An energy toroid recovered from the Temple of Profit's solar array on Orb Vallis. Sola Toroids store concentrated solar energy for Corpus research.
Sola Toroid.source: Temple of Profit enemies (Orb Vallis), Profit-Taker Orb
Sola Toroid.tb_use: Rare Fortuna resource. Required for high-tier Moa and Kitgun components. Farm Temple of Profit with a squad on Orb Vallis.

Spinal Core Section.name: Spinal Core Section
Spinal Core Section.description: A structural spine section recovered from Railjack crew and wreckage. Spinal Core Sections are load-bearing components of Corpus and Grineer capital ships.
Spinal Core Section.tb_use: Rare Railjack resource. Required for Railjack intrinsic upgrades and Wreckage repairs. Collect from Railjack mission debris fields.

Stellated Necrathene.name: Stellated Necrathene
Stellated Necrathene.description: A precisely stellated Necrathene crystal extracted from the richest Fortuna veins. Its star-cut facets refract light into brilliant displays.
Stellated Necrathene.source: Orb Vallis rare gem deposits (Fortuna mining)
Stellated Necrathene.tb_use: Rare Fortuna mining gem. Required for gilded Kitgun gilding and high-tier Solaris United trades.

Synathid Ecosynth Analyzer.name: Synathid Ecosynth Analyzer
Synathid Ecosynth Analyzer.description: A biological analyzer organ extracted from the Synathid fish of the Cambion Drift. These rare specimens detect and map the Infested ecosystem's energy flows.
Synathid Ecosynth Analyzer.source: Cambion Drift fishing — rare Synathid catch (Deimos)
Synathid Ecosynth Analyzer.tb_use: Rare Deimos fish component. Required for Daughter Token trades and Necraloid fishing-related blueprints. Use Fass Residue bait in Deimos pools.

Tellurium.name: Tellurium
Tellurium.description: An extremely rare metalloid found only in Archwing combat zones and aquatic Uranus missions. Tellurium decays rapidly once separated from its host environment.
Tellurium.tb_use: Rare crafting material. Required for advanced Archwing and Amp components. Very scarce — farm Archwing Exterminate on Uranus consistently.

Vainthorn.name: Vainthorn
Vainthorn.description: A barbed crystalline thorn that grows at the tips of calcified Infested tendrils on Deimos. Vainthorns are dense with stored hive-mind energy.
Vainthorn.tb_use: Rare Deimos resource. Required for Necraloid Specter blueprint crafting.

Vasto.name: Vasto
Vasto.description: A powerful Tenno revolver blueprint recovered from high-level mission caches. The Vasto delivers high-caliber Impact rounds per shot.
Vasto.tb_use: Weapon blueprint component. Craft the Vasto revolver in the Foundry.

Vega Toroid.name: Vega Toroid
Vega Toroid.description: An energy toroid recovered from the Harindi Crater on Orb Vallis. Vega Toroids were originally deployed as portable power cells for Corpus excavation equipment.
Vega Toroid.tb_use: Rare Fortuna resource. Required for Moa and K-Drive components from Fortuna vendors. Farm Harindi Crater with a full squad.

Voidplume Pinion.name: Voidplume Pinion
Voidplume Pinion.description: A feather-like Void crystal harvested from the Zariman Ten Zero's most Void-dense zones. Voidplume Pinions form at the tips of Void-growth crystalline structures.
Voidplume Pinion.tb_use: Rare Zariman resource. Required for Incarnon Genesis weapon upgrades. Farm Zariman Void Flood or Void Cascade at high difficulty.

Voidplume Quill.name: Voidplume Quill
Voidplume Quill.description: A larger Void crystal growth harvested from the Zariman's crystalline chambers. Voidplume Quills are the rarest Zariman drop, requiring significant Void exposure to find.
Voidplume Quill.tb_use: Rare Zariman resource. Rarest Voidplume tier. Required for the most advanced Incarnon Genesis upgrades. Farm Zariman Steel Path content.

Volt Neuroptics.name: Volt Neuroptics
Volt Neuroptics.description: The neural interface component for the Volt Warframe. Volt's components are distributed across Corpus assassination targets on Neptune and Jupiter.
Volt Neuroptics.source: The Sergeant (Iliad, Phobos) or Ambulas (Hades, Pluto)
Volt Neuroptics.tb_use: Warframe component blueprint. Required to assemble Volt with his Chassis and Systems blueprints. Run Sergeant or Ambulas assassination.

Ariette Scale.name: Ariette Scale
Ariette Scale.description: A delicate iridescent scale recovered from an Ariette fish caught in Orb Vallis. Ariette scales shimmer with a compound structure unique to Venus's cold lake environments.
Ariette Scale.tb_use: Uncommon Fortuna fish resource. Required for fishing standing trades at The Business and certain Kitgun component blueprints.

Asterite.name: Asterite
Asterite.description: A faceted gem formed deep within Cetus-region geology and extracted with a Nosam Cutter. Asterite forms in large nodules within the limestone base of the Plains.
Asterite.tb_use: Uncommon Plains gem. Required for mid-tier Cetus standing trades, Zaw blade blueprints, and Quills Amp components.

Axidrol Alloy.name: Axidrol Alloy
Axidrol Alloy.description: A heavy heat-resistant alloy recovered from Railjack wreckage. Axidrol alloys are used in Corpus and Grineer capital-ship hull plating.
Axidrol Alloy.tb_use: Uncommon Railjack resource. Required for Railjack hull repair and Avionics upgrades.

Cabochon Embolos.name: Cabochon Embolos
Cabochon Embolos.description: A smooth-polished gem extracted from the Orb Vallis geological strata. The Embolos has a convex profile used in precision optical Corpus instruments.
Cabochon Embolos.tb_use: Uncommon Fortuna mining gem. Used in Solaris United standing tier-up trades and certain Amp component blueprints.

Carbides.name: Carbides
Carbides.description: Hardened metal carbide particulate recovered from Railjack engine exhaust and battle debris. Carbides form when ultra-high temperatures fuse metal with carbon in space combat.
Carbides.tb_use: Uncommon Railjack resource. Used for hull and engine component repairs on Railjack upgrades.

Charc Electroplax.name: Charc Electroplax
Charc Electroplax.description: An electro-generating organ harvested from Charc Eel caught in the Plains of Eidolon. The electroplax generates strong bio-electric pulses.
Charc Electroplax.source: Plains of Eidolon fishing — Charc Eel catch
Charc Electroplax.tb_use: Uncommon fishing resource from the Plains. Required for Cetus standing trades and Operator Amp component blueprints at the Quills.

Condroc Wing.name: Condroc Wing
Condroc Wing.description: A feathered wing from a Condroc — the large avian fauna of the Plains of Eidolon. Condroc Wings are collected by tranq-shooting the birds and examining them.
Condroc Wing.source: Plains of Eidolon — Condroc wildlife (conservation or kill)
Condroc Wing.tb_use: Uncommon Plains wildlife resource. Required for Cetus standing trades and Ostron-related blueprints. Hunt Condrocs at night on the Plains.

Coprite Alloy.name: Coprite Alloy
Coprite Alloy.description: A dense copper-based alloy recovered from Railjack battle damage and wreckage fields. Coprite Alloy is used in Corpus ship armor reinforcement plating.
Coprite Alloy.tb_use: Uncommon Railjack resource. Required for Railjack Plating and Reactor component upgrades.

Cryotic.name: Cryotic
Cryotic.description: A deep-frozen crystalline mineral mined exclusively through Excavation missions. Cryotic is harvested from Excavators as they drill into subterranean ice formations.
Cryotic.tb_use: Uncommon crafting material. Required for Tonkor, Atlas Chassis, and Ivara Chassis. Farm Excavation missions.

Cubic Diodes.name: Cubic Diodes
Cubic Diodes.description: Precision cubic semiconductor diodes salvaged from Railjack avionics wreckage. Cubic Diodes are critical components in Railjack navigation and targeting systems.
Cubic Diodes.tb_use: Uncommon Railjack resource. Required for Railjack Avionics upgrades and Shield component crafting.

Detonite Ampule.name: Detonite Ampule
Detonite Ampule.description: Pressurised containers of Grineer explosive compound. Originally used in demolition charges and missile warheads, repurposed by the Tenno for component synthesis.
Detonite Ampule.source: Grineer enemies, Grineer Caches, Invasion rewards
Detonite Ampule.tb_use: Uncommon crafting material. Required for Grineer-tier weapon blueprints and some Warframe components. Farm from Grineer enemies.

Detonite Injector.name: Detonite Injector
Detonite Injector.description: A pressurised injector of refined Detonite. Produced by processing raw Detonite Ampules in the Foundry. Essential for Grineer-tier incendiary weapons.
Detonite Injector.source: Craft from Detonite Ampule×10 + Ferrite×400 + Plastids×150 + Polymer Bundle×500
Detonite Injector.tb_use: Rare craftable component. Required ×2 for Ignis. Must be crafted — cannot be farmed directly.

Devolved Namalon.name: Devolved Namalon
Devolved Namalon.description: A degenerated namalon organism harvested from the Cambion Drift. Devolved Namalon specimens have regressed from their complex pre-Infestation form into simplified bio-matter.
Devolved Namalon.tb_use: Uncommon Deimos resource. Required for several Mother Token trades and Entrati Syndicate blueprint crafting.

Dracroot.name: Dracroot
Dracroot.description: The root system of the Dracroot plant, found growing deep in the Cambion Drift's Infested substrate. Dracroot anchors itself into Infested biomass to extract nutrients.
Dracroot.tb_use: Uncommon Deimos plant resource. Used in Mother Token crafting for mid-tier Entrati standing.

Efervon Sample.name: Efervon Sample
Efervon Sample.description: A volatile bio-chemical sample collected from effervescent Infested growths on Deimos. Efervon Samples must be stored in pressurised containers before they dissolve.
Efervon Sample.tb_use: Uncommon Deimos resource. Required for Daughter Token trades and Necraloid Syndicate blueprints.

Esher Devar.name: Esher Devar
Esher Devar.description: A shimmering gem with a silky deep-blue lustre, extracted from Orb Vallis geological formations with a Sunpoint Plasma Drill.
Esher Devar.tb_use: Uncommon Fortuna mining gem. Used in Solaris United standing trades and mid-tier Kitgun components.

Fate Pearl.name: Fate Pearl
Fate Pearl.description: An iridescent pearl-like mineral extracted from mineral-rich beds at the bottom of the Plains of Eidolon. Its layered nacre structure defies normal crystallography.
Fate Pearl.tb_use: Uncommon Plains gem. Required for Cetus Amp components and mid-tier Quills standing trades.

Fersteel Alloy.name: Fersteel Alloy
Fersteel Alloy.description: A reinforced steel-ferrite composite alloy recovered from Railjack battle-frame wreckage. Fersteel is used in Grineer and Corpus capital-ship structural frames.
Fersteel Alloy.tb_use: Uncommon Railjack resource. Required for Railjack Forward Artillery and Shield component crafting.

Fieldron.name: Fieldron
Fieldron.description: A refined Corpus energy matrix produced from ten Fieldron Samples. Used as a component in advanced Corpus-derived Energy Lab weapons.
Fieldron.source: Craft from Fieldron Sample×10 + Control Module×1 + Salvage×500 + Plastids×250
Fieldron.tb_use: Uncommon craftable component. Required ×5 for Opticor. Plan ahead — each Fieldron takes 12 hours to build.

Fieldron Sample.name: Fieldron Sample
Fieldron Sample.description: Unstable energy capsules from Corpus laboratories and Invasion caches. Ten must be stabilised to produce a usable Fieldron.
Fieldron Sample.source: Corpus Invasion rewards, Corpus Caches, Orokin Derelict
Fieldron Sample.tb_use: Uncommon crafting material. Combine 10 Fieldron Samples in the Foundry to make a Fieldron — required for Opticor.

Ganglion.name: Ganglion
Ganglion.description: A bio-neural cluster extracted from large Infested organisms on Deimos. Ganglions serve as relay hubs within the Infested hive mind's distributed nervous system.
Ganglion.tb_use: Uncommon Deimos resource. Used in Daughter Token crafting and Predasite companion component blueprints.

Goblite Tears.name: Goblite Tears
Goblite Tears.description: Translucent mineral drops extracted from Goblite ore veins on the Plains of Eidolon. Their teardrop shape is formed by crystallisation around water inclusions.
Goblite Tears.tb_use: Uncommon Plains gem. Required for Cetus standing trades and Fisher Hai-Luk's advanced bait blueprints.

Goopolla Spleen.name: Goopolla Spleen
Goopolla Spleen.description: The internal organ of a Goopolla fish caught in the Plains of Eidolon. The spleen stores compressed bio-gel used as a lubricant in the fish's unique locomotion.
Goopolla Spleen.source: Plains of Eidolon fishing — Goopolla catch
Goopolla Spleen.tb_use: Uncommon fishing resource. Required for Cetus standing trades and Quills component blueprints.

Gorgaricus Spore.name: Gorgaricus Spore
Gorgaricus Spore.description: A spore cluster from the Gorgaricus fungal growth found in Deimos's Infested biomass layers. These spores catalyse rapid cell division when exposed to Void light.
Gorgaricus Spore.tb_use: Uncommon Deimos resource. Required for Entrati family Token crafting and Necraloid blueprints.

Heart Noctrul.name: Heart Noctrul
Heart Noctrul.description: A deep-red mineral gem with a pulsing internal luminescence, extracted from the richest Fortuna ore veins at night when thermal activity peaks.
Heart Noctrul.tb_use: Uncommon Fortuna gem. Required for Solaris United standing tier-up trades and Kitgun Grip blueprints at Zuud.

Heart Nyth.name: Heart Nyth
Heart Nyth.description: A warm rose-coloured gem with a heart-shaped internal void, extracted from Plains of Eidolon mineral deposits.
Heart Nyth.tb_use: Uncommon Plains gem. Required for Cetus standing trades and Zaw Strike component blueprints.

Hespazym Alloy.name: Hespazym Alloy
Hespazym Alloy.description: A lightweight alloy recovered from Railjack ship debris. Hespazym is used in Corpus propulsion systems for its heat-resistant and low-mass properties.
Hespazym Alloy.tb_use: Uncommon Railjack resource. Required for Railjack Integrated and Battle Avionic upgrades.

Hexenon.name: Hexenon
Hexenon.description: An industrial chemical byproduct produced during Corpus manufacturing processes on Jupiter. Hexenon is captured from factory run-off in Jupiter's gas-layer platforms.
Hexenon.tb_use: Uncommon crafting material. Required for Gauss Neuroptics/Chassis/Systems blueprints. Farm Jupiter Disruption (Kappa or Io) specifically.

Höllvanian Pitchweave Fragment.name: Höllvanian Pitchweave Fragment
Höllvanian Pitchweave Fragment.description: A fragment of pitch-black woven composite material found on Höllvania. The Pitchweave is produced by Techrot organisms and used as structural reinforcement.
Höllvanian Pitchweave Fragment.source: Höllvania mission caches, Techrot enemy drops
Höllvanian Pitchweave Fragment.tb_use: Uncommon Höllvania resource. Required for Drifter crafting blueprints and Syndicate medallion exchanges.

Iradite.name: Iradite
Iradite.description: An orange-red mineral found in Grineer containers and geological outcrops on the Plains of Eidolon. Iradite gets its colour from iron-rich compound oxidation.
Iradite.source: Plains of Eidolon containers, Grineer camps
Iradite.tb_use: Uncommon Plains resource. Required for mid-tier Zaw handles and Cetus standing tier-ups. Smash Grineer containers while running bounties.

Kuaka Spinal Claw.name: Kuaka Spinal Claw
Kuaka Spinal Claw.description: A bony claw extracted from a Kuaka — the small rodent-like wildlife of the Plains of Eidolon. Kuaka Spinal Claws are barbed and extremely tough.
Kuaka Spinal Claw.source: Plains of Eidolon — Kuaka wildlife (conservation or kill)
Kuaka Spinal Claw.tb_use: Uncommon wildlife resource. Required for Cetus standing trades and certain Ostron blueprints.

Kuva.name: Kuva
Kuva.description: A scarlet bio-energy fluid extracted from the Queens' Kuva Fortress. Kuva empowers Grineer queens and is used by Tenno to reroll Riven Mod attributes.
Kuva.source: Kuva Siphon and Kuva Flood missions, Kuva Fortress
Kuva.tb_use: Special resource. Used to reroll Riven Mod stats. Farm Kuva Siphon missions; Kuva Floods yield 550+ per mission.

Lamentus.name: Lamentus
Lamentus.description: A sombre deep-purple gem extracted from Deimos's denser mineral formations. Lamentus crystals form where Void energy has permanently stressed the rock.
Lamentus.tb_use: Uncommon Deimos gem. Required for Daughter Token trades and mid-tier Necraloid blueprints.

Longwinder Lathe Coagulant.name: Longwinder Lathe Coagulant
Longwinder Lathe Coagulant.description: A thick biological coagulant extracted from the digestive tract of a Longwinder fish caught in the Cambion Drift.
Longwinder Lathe Coagulant.tb_use: Uncommon Deimos fish resource. Required for Daughter Token fishing trades.

Lua Thrax Plasm.name: Lua Thrax Plasm
Lua Thrax Plasm.description: A luminescent bio-plasma harvested from Thrax enemies on Lua — spectral Orokin soldiers animated by Void resonance in the Zariman's path.
Lua Thrax Plasm.source: Thrax enemy drops on Lua (Cascade missions)
Lua Thrax Plasm.tb_use: Uncommon Lua resource. Required for Zariman-origin weapon component blueprints. Farm Lua Cascade or Conjunction Survival missions.

Lucent Teroglobe.name: Lucent Teroglobe
Lucent Teroglobe.description: A spherical gem with inner light-scattering properties, found in the deepest ore deposits of the Plains of Eidolon.
Lucent Teroglobe.source: Plains of Eidolon rare mining deposits
Lucent Teroglobe.tb_use: Uncommon Plains gem. Required for high-tier Quills standing trades and Amp Prism blueprints.

Marquise Thyst.name: Marquise Thyst
Marquise Thyst.description: A marquise-cut amethyst-coloured gem extracted from Fortuna ore veins. Its elongated cut maximises light refraction through its crystal interior.
Marquise Thyst.tb_use: Uncommon Fortuna gem. Required for Solaris United standing trades and Kitgun Barrel component blueprints.

Maw Fang.name: Maw Fang
Maw Fang.description: A serrated fang extracted from the Maw — the giant sand-predator that ambushes lone Tenno on the Plains of Eidolon at night.
Maw Fang.tb_use: Uncommon Plains wildlife drop. Required for Cetus standing trades and certain Ostron craftable blueprints.

Mortus Horn.name: Mortus Horn
Mortus Horn.description: A bony protrusion recovered from a Mortus Lungfish caught in Orb Vallis. The horn is used by the fish to break ice formations in Venus's frozen lakes.
Mortus Horn.source: Orb Vallis fishing — Mortus Lungfish catch
Mortus Horn.tb_use: Uncommon fishing resource from Fortuna. Required for The Business fishing standing trades and certain Moa blueprint components.

Murkray Liver.name: Murkray Liver
Murkray Liver.description: The large liver of a Murkray fish — a prized Cetus catch. The Murkray's liver produces a natural toxin that filters the tidal pollutants on the Plains.
Murkray Liver.source: Plains of Eidolon fishing — Murkray catch
Murkray Liver.tb_use: Uncommon fishing resource. Required for mid-tier Cetus standing trades. Use Murkray Bait during the day for reliable Murkray spawns.

Mutagen Mass.name: Mutagen Mass
Mutagen Mass.description: A stabilised Infested mutagen compound produced from ten Mutagen Samples. Used as a component in Infested-derived weapons and companion genetics.
Mutagen Mass.source: Craft from Mutagen Sample×10 + Neurodes×2 + Nano Spores×5000 + Alloy Plate×500
Mutagen Mass.tb_use: Uncommon craftable component. Required for Hema and Ignis Wraith blueprints. Plan ahead — takes 12 hours to build.

Mutagen Sample.name: Mutagen Sample
Mutagen Sample.description: An unstable Infested genetic sample collected from active Infestation zones. Ten samples must be combined in the Foundry to produce a Mutagen Mass.
Mutagen Sample.source: Eris, Orokin Derelict, Deimos Infested missions
Mutagen Sample.tb_use: Uncommon crafting material. Combine 10 Mutagen Samples to make a Mutagen Mass. Farm Eris Survival for stacks.

Mytocardia Spore.name: Mytocardia Spore
Mytocardia Spore.description: A spore released by the rare Mytocardia organism found deep within the Cambion Drift. These spores contain concentrated Infested neural tissue.
Mytocardia Spore.source: Cambion Drift rare growths, Isolation Vault bounty rewards (Deimos)
Mytocardia Spore.tb_use: Uncommon Deimos resource. Required for Necramech component blueprint crafting. Farm Isolation Vault bounties.

Narmer Isoplast.name: Narmer Isoplast
Narmer Isoplast.description: An isoplastic compound developed by the Narmer cult-Corpus to reinforce their veiled-infantry armour. Recovered from Narmer Bounty rewards.
Narmer Isoplast.source: Narmer Bounty rewards (Plains of Eidolon, Orb Vallis, Cambion Drift)
Narmer Isoplast.tb_use: Uncommon crafting material. Required for Nira's Vengeance and other Narmer-tier weapon components. Farm Narmer Bounty missions.

Necracoil.name: Necracoil
Necracoil.description: A coiled neural-mechanical spring recovered from disabled Necramech units on Deimos. Necracoils translate the Necramech's Void-drive signals into movement.
Necracoil.tb_use: Uncommon Deimos resource. Required for Necramech component upgrade blueprints. Farm Cambion Drift Necramech enemies.

Norg Brain.name: Norg Brain
Norg Brain.description: The complex neural organ from a Norg fish — a nocturnal species found in the deep pools of the Plains of Eidolon. Norg Brains are dense with bio-electric tissue.
Norg Brain.source: Plains of Eidolon fishing — Norg catch (night only)
Norg Brain.tb_use: Uncommon fishing resource. Required for Cetus standing trades and Quills Amp component blueprints. Use Norg Bait at night on the Plains.

Oxium.name: Oxium
Oxium.description: Ultra-light structural compound produced by Corpus Oxium Osprey drones. Notoriously difficult to farm — Ospreys must be killed before they self-destruct.
Oxium.source: Corpus Oxium Ospreys (Europa, Io, Outer Terminus)
Oxium.tb_use: Uncommon crafting material. Required for Zephyr, Carrier Prime, and Shaku. Kill Ospreys quickly — they destroy their own Oxium on death.

Plastids.name: Plastids
Plastids.description: Organic polymer secreted by Infested organisms and harvested as a flexible building material. Found on Saturn, Phobos, Pluto, and Eris.
Plastids.tb_use: Uncommon crafting material. Used in nearly every Warframe Systems blueprint and many weapons. Prioritise farming on Saturn.

Purged Dagonic.name: Purged Dagonic
Purged Dagonic.description: A chemically purified Dagonic specimen from Deimos fishing pools. The purging process neutralises the Dagonic's natural toxins, making it safe to handle.
Purged Dagonic.source: Cambion Drift fishing — Dagonic catch + Daughter processing (Deimos)
Purged Dagonic.tb_use: Uncommon Deimos fish component. Required for Daughter Token trades. Catch raw Dagonic fish and process them at the Necralisk.

Pustulite.name: Pustulite
Pustulite.description: A bubble-like mineral secretion found on the exterior of calcified Infested growths on Deimos. Pustulite forms when Infested biofluid solidifies on contact with air.
Pustulite.tb_use: Uncommon Deimos resource. Used in Entrati Token crafting and mid-tier Necraloid blueprint components.

Pyrotic Alloy.name: Pyrotic Alloy
Pyrotic Alloy.description: A heat-forged alloy recovered from the blast craters left by Railjack artillery fire. Pyrotic Alloy is used in high-temperature Grineer and Corpus weapon systems.
Pyrotic Alloy.tb_use: Uncommon Railjack resource. Required for Railjack Turret and Ordnance component upgrades.

Radian Sentirum.name: Radian Sentirum
Radian Sentirum.description: A radiant amber gem found in Plains of Eidolon mineral deposits. Radian Sentirum glows faintly at dusk, absorbing the day's sunlight and releasing it slowly.
Radian Sentirum.source: Plains of Eidolon mining (dusk/dawn yields best results)
Radian Sentirum.tb_use: Uncommon Plains gem. Required for Quills Amp Prism and mid-tier Zaw component blueprints.

Radiant Zodian.name: Radiant Zodian
Radiant Zodian.description: A brilliant faceted gem from Fortuna's Orb Vallis mining fields. Radiant Zodian is the refined quality of Zodian — precision-extracted from deep veins.
Radiant Zodian.tb_use: Uncommon Fortuna gem. Required for high-tier Solaris United standing and Kitgun Grip blueprints.

Rune Marrow.name: Rune Marrow
Rune Marrow.description: The ossified marrow from Runic Fossils buried deep in Deimos's biomass-rock layers. Rune Marrow resonates with ancient Orokin frequency signatures.
Rune Marrow.tb_use: Uncommon Deimos resource. Required for Entrati Token and Necraloid Syndicate blueprint crafting.

Saggen Pearl.name: Saggen Pearl
Saggen Pearl.description: A pearl-like mineral ball extracted from the soft sedimentary layers of the Plains of Eidolon. Its smooth exterior is polished by geological pressure.
Saggen Pearl.tb_use: Uncommon Plains gem. Required for Cetus Amp component and Zaw hilt blueprints.

Sharrac Teeth.name: Sharrac Teeth
Sharrac Teeth.description: Serrated teeth extracted from a Sharrac fish caught in the Plains of Eidolon. These teeth are prized by Ostron craftsmen for their natural sharpness.
Sharrac Teeth.source: Plains of Eidolon fishing — Sharrac catch
Sharrac Teeth.tb_use: Uncommon fishing resource. Required for Cetus standing and mid-tier Fisher Hai-Luk trades.

Silphsela.name: Silphsela
Silphsela.description: The silken thread-like secretion of the Silphsela organism on Deimos. These filaments are used to reinforce Infested tissue structures.
Silphsela.tb_use: Uncommon Deimos resource. Required for Necraloid blueprint crafting and Entrati Token trades.

Somatic Fibers.name: Somatic Fibers
Somatic Fibers.description: Neural-muscular fibers extracted from mobile Infested organisms on Deimos. Somatic Fibers bridge the biomechanical interface between the Infested nervous system and muscle tissue.
Somatic Fibers.tb_use: Uncommon Deimos resource. Required for Predasite and Vulpaphyla companion genetic component blueprints.

Star Amarast.name: Star Amarast
Star Amarast.description: A star-cut rose-gold gem extracted from the Plains of Eidolon. Star Amarast has an exceptionally high lustre prized by Ostron jewellers and Tenno artisans.
Star Amarast.tb_use: Uncommon Plains gem. Required for high-tier Quills Amp components and Zaw Strike blueprints.

Star Crimzian.name: Star Crimzian
Star Crimzian.description: A vivid crimson gem from deep Plains of Eidolon veins. Star Crimzian's faceted star pattern is formed by hexagonal crystal growth under directional pressure.
Star Crimzian.source: Plains of Eidolon rare mining deposits
Star Crimzian.tb_use: Uncommon Plains gem. Required for top-tier Zaw components and high-tier Cetus standing trades.

Stela.name: Stela
Stela.description: A flat, tablet-shaped mineral extracted from Fortuna's compressed ore bands. Stela minerals are used as substrate boards in Corpus micro-electronics.
Stela.tb_use: Uncommon Fortuna gem. Required for mid-tier Kitgun and Moa component blueprints at Rude Zuud.

Tasoma Extract.name: Tasoma Extract
Tasoma Extract.description: A viscous extract from the Tasoma root — a Deimos bioluminescent plant that processes Infested toxins into harvestable compounds.
Tasoma Extract.tb_use: Uncommon Deimos plant extract. Used in Entrati Token crafting and Necraloid mid-tier blueprints.

Tear Azurite.name: Tear Azurite
Tear Azurite.description: A teardrop-shaped deep-blue gem found in the lower mineral layers of the Plains of Eidolon. Its colour comes from copper-rich mineral inclusions.
Tear Azurite.tb_use: Uncommon Plains gem. Required for Cetus standing tier-ups and Quills Amp component blueprints.

Techrot Motherboard.name: Techrot Motherboard
Techrot Motherboard.description: The central control board salvaged from a Techrot-strain robotic unit. Techrot Motherboards contain corrupted Corpus AI firmware overwritten by the Techrot strain.
Techrot Motherboard.tb_use: Uncommon Höllvania resource. Required for Drifter-era weapon component crafting and Syndicate Token trades at the Chrysalith.

Thaumic Distillate.name: Thaumic Distillate
Thaumic Distillate.description: A refined Void-energy liquid produced by condensing the ambient Void resonance from Zariman hull material. Thaumic Distillate is used in Drifter bio-engineering.
Thaumic Distillate.tb_use: Uncommon Zariman resource. Required for several Incarnon Genesis weapon adaptations and Drifter crafting components.

Thermal Sludge.name: Thermal Sludge
Thermal Sludge.description: A semi-solid heat-retaining compound dredged from the geothermal pools scattered across the Plains of Eidolon. Ostron engineers use it as an industrial lubricant.
Thermal Sludge.source: Plains of Eidolon geothermal vents, Grineer containers
Thermal Sludge.tb_use: Uncommon Plains resource. Required for Cetus standing trades and some Amp component blueprints.

Thrax Plasm.name: Thrax Plasm
Thrax Plasm.description: Bio-plasma extracted from Thrax Centurions and Legates — spectral Void-animated soldiers from the Zariman Ten Zero. Thrax Plasm resonates with intense Void energy.
Thrax Plasm.tb_use: Uncommon Zariman/Lua resource. Required for Incarnon Genesis weapon upgrades. Farm Zariman Cascade or Lua Drift missions.

Titanium.name: Titanium
Titanium.description: A lightweight yet incredibly strong structural metal found in Railjack wreckage and space-combat debris. Titanium is the primary structural element in Corpus and Grineer warship framing.
Titanium.tb_use: Uncommon Railjack resource. Required for Railjack Hull and Reactor component upgrades.

Tralok Eyes.name: Tralok Eyes
Tralok Eyes.description: The compound photoreceptor organs from a Tralok fish caught in the Plains of Eidolon. These eyes have exceptional low-light sensitivity adapted for deep-water hunting.
Tralok Eyes.source: Plains of Eidolon fishing — Tralok catch
Tralok Eyes.tb_use: Uncommon fishing resource. Required for Cetus standing trades and Quills Amp stage components.

Trapezium Xenorhast.name: Trapezium Xenorhast
Trapezium Xenorhast.description: A trapezoidal gem with a deep green lustre, found in Fortuna ore seams. Its unusual trapezoid cut is natural — the crystal grows in this shape under Venusian pressure conditions.
Trapezium Xenorhast.tb_use: Uncommon Fortuna gem. Required for Solaris United standing and Kitgun barrel blueprint crafting at Rude Zuud.

Travocyte Alloy.name: Travocyte Alloy
Travocyte Alloy.description: A synthetic alloy recovered from Railjack propulsion system wreckage. Travocyte Alloy is engineered to withstand the extreme stress of Void-jump drives.
Travocyte Alloy.tb_use: Uncommon Railjack resource. Required for Railjack Engine component upgrades and Void-drive installation.

Tromyzon Entroplasma.name: Tromyzon Entroplasma
Tromyzon Entroplasma.description: The entroplasma organ of a Tromyzon fish caught in the Orb Vallis lakes. This organ generates entropy-field shielding that protects the Tromyzon from Fortuna's extreme cold.
Tromyzon Entroplasma.tb_use: Uncommon fishing resource. Required for The Business fishing standing trades and Moa component blueprints.

Ueymag.name: Ueymag
Ueymag.description: A bio-mineral compound harvested from Ueymag fish caught in the sub-glacial vents of Orb Vallis. Its dense mineral structure makes it useful in cold-weather Corpus armour.
Ueymag.tb_use: Uncommon Fortuna fishing resource. Required for The Business standing trades and Kitgun Grip component blueprints.

Venerdo Alloy.name: Venerdo Alloy
Venerdo Alloy.description: A layered composite alloy recovered from Railjack battle-frame armour segments. Venerdo Alloy is the primary material in Corpus fighter craft fuselage construction.
Venerdo Alloy.tb_use: Uncommon Railjack resource. Required for Railjack Shield and Fuselage component upgrades.

Voidgel Orb.name: Voidgel Orb
Voidgel Orb.description: A sealed sphere of Void-gel — a semi-living substance that forms spontaneously in Zariman Zero's Void-saturated corridors. Voidgel Orbs pulse faintly with contained Void energy.
Voidgel Orb.tb_use: Uncommon Zariman resource. Required for Incarnon Genesis weapon adaptations and Drifter weapon component blueprints.
